title: Altcoins Surging Amid Steady Rise in BTC Price
description: Market Overview The crypto market capitalisation has risen by 0.75% over the past 24 hours, reaching $2.69 trillion. The top three performers are Zcash (+29%), Toncoin (+23%) and Filecoin (+16%). The underperformers are Ethereum (−0.4%), Algorand (−0.5%) and Basic Attention Token (−4.6%). title: Earnings Tests Loom for Crypto Miners
description: The CoinShares Bitcoin Mining ETF (WGMI) is positioned as an earnings play as a bevy of the ETF’s holdings, including several of the largest components, are slated to deliver quarterly results.
